name: Tower Run Online - Stack Tower Jump
description: Tower Run Online is an easy arcade jumping game. You will run in a truck with lots of obstacles. When you stand the rea circles, you could jump on the other person's shoulder. Have you heard of the pyramid? You can do this too! Jump over the walls and collect coins. Higher pyramid, you will get more coins in the end. Coins could unlock the new person, to unlock them all.
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Boy, Boys, H5, HTML5, Kid, Kids, run, running
